description_long: This is a modern, two-story house with a flat roof and large, grid-style windows dominating the facade. The front features a spacious wooden deck with a swimming pool, several lounge chairs, and wide glass doors that open into the living area. The exterior is primarily white with black window frames, giving it a sleek, contemporary appearance. The house includes a rooftop terrace, visible railings, and a mix of open and enclosed spaces, suggesting a focus on indoor-outdoor living. The rear and side elevations show a consistent window pattern, with some rooms decorated with wall art and furniture visible through the glass. The main entryway is understated, with a single door and a small welcome mat, lacking a porch or overhang.
description: A modern, two-story white house with large black-framed windows, a flat roof, and a poolside wooden deck. The design emphasizes open spaces and indoor-outdoor living.
description_view_0: Front view showing the pool, wooden deck, open glass doors, and main living area with lounge chairs.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the long row of windows, rooftop terrace, and interior decor visible through the glass.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the main entry door, symmetrical window arrangement, and rooftop features.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a clear look at the pool, deck, and the house's boxy, modern structure.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical rows of large grid-style windows
attribute_entryway_design: Simple single door with a small welcome mat, no porch or overhang, minimalistic modern style
